---
title: "skills-marketplace"
date: '2026-03-13'
categories: [project, ai, agents, tools]
github_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/skills-marketplace"
project_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/skills-marketplace"
image: "https://opengraph.github.com/repo/lawwu/skills-marketplace"
stars: 0
project_lang: "Python"
---

A Cookiecutter template for building an agent skills marketplace — scaffold the boilerplate for packaging, distributing, and discovering skills for AI agents.

[View on GitHub →](https://github.com/lawwu/skills-marketplace)
